purpose: canonical audited evidence for the Chapter 9 cyclic column validation before the full building case

entries.label: fig:validacion-cyclic-load-protocol
entries.evidence_role: Applied cyclic drift protocol before local/global model comparison.
entries.metric_summary: protocol figure copied from the audited cyclic_validation bundle
entries.not_claimed: Does not by itself validate any structural or local response.

entries.label: fig:validacion-internal-hysteresis-200mm
entries.evidence_role: N=10 Lobatto structural reference under the 200 mm cyclic column protocol.
entries.metric_summary: status=completed; drift=200.0 mm; points=49; wall=5.6 s
entries.not_claimed: Does not prove local crack topology; it is the structural reference curve.

entries.label: fig:validacion-external-structural-hysteresis
entries.evidence_role: External comparator check for the structural cyclic response.
entries.not_claimed: Does not make the external solver an absolute truth model.

entries.label: fig:validacion-xfem-bounded-dowel-200mm
entries.evidence_role: Promoted XFEM local baseline against the N=10 Lobatto structural reference.
entries.not_claimed: Does not extrapolate outside the audited 200 mm cyclic column protocol.

entries.label: fig:validacion-continuum-crack-gate-200mm
entries.chapter9_slot: crack opening and cracked Gauss evolution
entries.evidence_role: Continuum crack/opening gate including cracked/open material-point fractions.
entries.not_claimed: Does not promote the smeared continuum crack field as objective localization.

entries.label: fig:validacion-continuum-steel-stress-200mm
entries.evidence_role: Steel stress-vs-drift diagnostic for the continuum cyclic column branch.
entries.not_claimed: Does not imply that the continuum branch is the promoted two-way local model.

entries.label: fig:validacion-solver-policy-cost
entries.evidence_role: Solver policy matrix used to separate physical failure from nonlinear-solver debt.
entries.not_claimed: Does not promote a solver policy without physical response gates.

entries.label: fig:validacion-fe2-one-way-managed-xfem-n10-200mm
entries.evidence_role: Managed XFEM one-way replay using persistent local sites and the N=10 reference history.
entries.not_claimed: Does not alter the macro response; it validates replay and observation only.

entries.label: fig:validacion-kobathe-cyclic-bias-probe
entries.evidence_role: Small Ko-Bathe cyclic probe with embedded bars, used to audit crack activation and cost.
entries.metric_summary: completed=True; steps=36; peak_cracked_gp=12; max_opening=3.826 mm; wall=27.9 s
entries.not_claimed: Does not promote Ko-Bathe as the main two-way local model.
